name: Classic Margherita
description: The timeless classic. Fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and fragrant basil on a hand-tossed crust.
longDescription: Our Margherita is a tribute to Italian tradition. We use San Marzano tomato sauce, hand-pulled fior di latte mozzarella, and fresh basil leaves drizzled with extra virgin olive oil. Baked at 450°C in our wood-fired oven for 90 seconds — perfection every time.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.comment: Absolutely divine! The best margherita I've ever had. The cheese pull is unreal!

reviews.name: Rahul M.
reviews.comment: Simple, fresh, and perfect. My go-to every single time. Never disappoints.

reviews.name: Ananya K.
reviews.comment: Great pizza, arrived hot and fresh. Would love a little more basil next time!

name: Pepperoni Feast
description: Loaded with crispy, curled pepperoni and a triple layer of gooey melted cheese.
longDescription: For the meat lover in you. We pile on premium aged pepperoni that curls up into crispy little cups when baked, pooling with their own spicy oils. Three kinds of cheese — mozzarella, provolone, and cheddar — melt underneath for the ultimate cheesy experience.

reviews.name: Aarav T.
reviews.comment: The pepperoni cups filled with spicy oil are EVERYTHING. Addictive.

reviews.name: Siddhi P.
reviews.comment: Best pepperoni in the city. Period. The cheese is perfect.

reviews.name: Karan J.
reviews.comment: Very good, but I wish it came with a dipping sauce. Otherwise 10/10!

name: Veggie Supreme
description: A garden on your pizza. Colorful bell peppers, red onions, mushrooms, and black olives.
longDescription: Freshness in every bite. We load this pizza with a vibrant medley of red, yellow, and green bell peppers, caramelized red onions, earthy mushrooms, Kalamata olives, and sun-dried tomatoes — all on a herbed tomato base with fresh mozzarella.

reviews.name: Nisha R.
reviews.comment: Finally a veggie pizza that doesn't feel like a compromise. Absolutely delicious!

reviews.name: Varun L.
reviews.comment: Great flavors, very fresh. The olives make it stand out.

reviews.name: Meera V.
reviews.comment: My favourite! Ordered 3 times this week. The caramelized onions are 🔥

name: BBQ Chicken
description: Tangy smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onions, and fresh cilantro.
longDescription: Our smoky BBQ Chicken pizza starts with a base of tangy house-made BBQ sauce, topped with juicy grilled chicken strips marinated in spices, sharp red onions, roasted corn, and finished with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of ranch dressing.

reviews.name: Rohit D.
reviews.comment: The BBQ sauce is unlike anything else. Sweet, smoky, and absolutely perfect.

reviews.name: Pooja A.
reviews.comment: Chef's pick is well deserved! The chicken is so tender and the ranch takes it over the top.

reviews.name: Ajay B.
reviews.comment: Really good! Love the flavour combination. Slightly more chicken would be great.

name: Hawaiian Bliss
description: Sweet & savoury — premium ham, juicy pineapple chunks, and melted mozzarella.
longDescription: The controversial classic done right. We use thick-cut smoked ham, fresh pineapple (not tinned!), and a light honey-mustard glaze underneath our tomato base. The sweet-savoury balance will convert even the biggest pineapple-on-pizza sceptic.

reviews.name: Tanya S.
reviews.comment: I was a sceptic but this converted me completely. The fresh pineapple is key!

reviews.name: Kunal M.
reviews.comment: The honey mustard glaze is genius. Surprisingly balanced flavors.

reviews.name: Riya P.
reviews.comment: My absolute comfort food! Always order this when I have a long day.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: An Indian fusion masterpiece — tandoori-marinated paneer, capsicum, and green chutney.
longDescription: India meets Italy in this iconic fusion pizza. Tender paneer cubes marinated in a rich tandoori masala are paired with colourful capsicum, red onions, and tomatoes on a spiced makhani sauce base, finished with a drizzle of mint-coriander chutney and chaat masala.

reviews.name: Shreya N.
reviews.comment: This is INSANE. The makhani base + tandoori paneer is a combination made in heaven.

reviews.name: Arjun K.
reviews.comment: The chaat masala finish is so clever. Best Indian pizza I've had anywhere!

reviews.name: Divya R.
reviews.comment: Ordered 5 times now. Never ever disappointed. The chutney drizzle is everything.

name: Four Cheese Royale
description: A cheese lover's dream — mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and aged cheddar.
longDescription: For the true cheese connoisseur. This rich, indulgent pizza uses no tomato sauce — just a white garlic cream base layered with four premium cheeses: stretchy mozzarella, sharp gorgonzola, nutty aged parmesan, and creamy cheddar, finished with a honey drizzle and fresh thyme.

reviews.name: Aditi V.
reviews.comment: The honey on four cheese is absolute genius. Rich, decadent, and worth every rupee.

reviews.name: Sanjay K.
reviews.comment: If you love cheese, this is your pizza. The gorgonzola gives it a depth that's incredible.

reviews.name: Priti L.
reviews.comment: Very rich and delicious. Maybe share with someone — very filling! But 10/10.

name: Mexican Fiesta
description: Bold, spicy, and loaded — jalapeños, black beans, corn, salsa, and sour cream.
longDescription: Bring the heat! This bold pizza starts with a spicy salsa base, loaded with seasoned black beans, roasted corn, fiery jalapeños, and red kidney beans. Topped with mozzarella and finished with a swirl of cool sour cream and crushed tortilla chips for crunch.

reviews.name: Harsh T.
reviews.comment: The tortilla chips on top add the most amazing crunch. Absolutely brilliant!

reviews.name: Nidhi P.
reviews.comment: Very spicy — exactly as advertised! Loved every bite. The sour cream balances perfectly.

reviews.name: Rohan S.
reviews.comment: Mexican pizza that actually tastes Mexican! The jalapeños are not shy here. Loved it.
